meaning: vt.涂以油或软膏,施以涂油礼
examples: I anoint the head and nose of each sheep with the same oil, and allow them to graze.
You put oil on their heads. That's how you anoint a king.
Then the LORD said, "Rise and anoint him; he is the one."
Nowadays, there exists no PR panacea that will anoint and sustain a startup for the long term.
Then Suharto made public his desire to stay in power and seemed to anoint a vice president.
